title: Italian Brainrot Sounds
description: Adds the Italian brainrot animal sounds as craftable items that play sounds.
body:
Adds the italian brainrot animals as items that play their sounds.

- Tralalero Tralala
- Bombardino Crocodilo
- Tung Tung Tung Sahur
- Lirili Larila
- Boneca Ambalabu
- Brr Brr Patapim
- Chimpanzini Bananini
- Bombombini Gusini
- Cappuccino Assassino
- Trippi Troppi
- Frigo Camelo
- Bobrito Bandito

Also adds a custom AI-generated music disc.
